file: tmp_【#Myth5years】hololive English -Myth- 5th Anniversary Concert： Fortune Spinner [HT_HUFi8DJ4]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_001.mov

scenes.description: Hololive English -Myth- members perform a medley of their group and solo songs on a grand stage with various lighting effects.
scenes.song_name: hololive English Medley - Breaking Dimensions & Connect the World -

scenes.description: The members catch their breath and talk to the audience about the medley, their 5th anniversary, and the stage setup.

subtitles.english: Why are they being so silly? We have a show to do!

subtitles.original: Come on, Ina, come on, come on!

subtitles.english: I know the floor is nice, but...

subtitles.original: It is really nice. It's smooth.
subtitles.english: It is really nice. It's smooth.

subtitles.original: Uh, sorry. 皆様、皆様。
subtitles.english: Uh, sorry. Everyone, everyone.

subtitles.original: Thank you for coming to the show today to celebrate Myth's, you guessed it, fifth anniversary!
subtitles.english: Thank you for coming to the show today to celebrate Myth's, you guessed it, fifth anniversary!

subtitles.original: Yippee!
subtitles.english: Yippee!

subtitles.original: Was the medley a nice throwback? We've made so many songs together.
subtitles.english: Was the medley a nice throwback? We've made so many songs together.

subtitles.original: Yeah, nostalgic, yeah.
subtitles.english: Yeah, nostalgic, yeah.

subtitles.original: Putting it all together like that is like really emotional.
subtitles.english: Putting it all together like that is like really emotional.

subtitles.original: And it's not just like our fifth anniversary, it's also Hololive English as a whole! Five years!
subtitles.english: And it's not just like our fifth anniversary, it's also Hololive English as a whole! Five years!

subtitles.original: Don't do that!
subtitles.english: Don't do that!

subtitles.original: We're so...!
subtitles.english: We're so...!

subtitles.original: We're so old! Old! We're old! Yippee!
subtitles.english: We're so old! Old! We're old! Yippee!

subtitles.original: They're old too. We've also achieved so much in the last five years, you know?
subtitles.english: They're old too. We've also achieved so much in the last five years, you know?

subtitles.original: Yeah, we had three EN concerts. My voice cracked, but that's also...
subtitles.english: Yeah, we had three EN concerts. My voice cracked, but that's also...

subtitles.original: Let's go!
subtitles.english: Let's go!

subtitles.original: And we had a lot of friends join us over the years. And this, you know, in the end I'm just really happy to be performing with you guys. It's so much fun.
subtitles.english: And we had a lot of friends join us over the years. And this, you know, in the end I'm just really happy to be performing with you guys. It's so much fun.

subtitles.original: Yeah! We can't get too emotional just yet though, because we have a show to do! Mm-hm! Yes!
subtitles.english: Yeah! We can't get too emotional just yet though, because we have a show to do! Mm-hm! Yes!

subtitles.original: Anyways, anyways, there's a hashtag right here, right here.
subtitles.english: Anyways, anyways, there's a hashtag right here, right here.

subtitles.original: Yes, yes, important.
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, important.

subtitles.original: Over here. Take lots of pictures, screenshots and post them on social media. #Myth5years. Woo! Make us trend!
subtitles.english: Over here. Take lots of pictures, screenshots and post them on social media. #Myth5years. Woo! Make us trend!

subtitles.original: Trending, get it trending! Number one!
subtitles.english: Trending, get it trending! Number one!

subtitles.original: If you want. You don't have to if you don't want to. Just kidding, if you don't do it we'll be sad.

subtitles.english: We'll be angry. We'll get you. Okay. Choosing violence.

subtitles.english: ...making sure you guys are all here legally. Ta-da! Oh my! Did you guys all receive a ticket? Hmm?

subtitles.original: Oh, I remember that. Ah, it's me! It's me! That's me! We look so cool! Yeah, so cool!
subtitles.english: Oh, I remember that. Ah, it's me! It's me! That's me! We look so cool! Yeah, so cool!

subtitles.original: Yeah, I think I gave you mine at the bar. It was kind of spicy, remember?
subtitles.english: Yeah, I think I gave you mine at the bar. It was kind of spicy, remember?

subtitles.original: I accosted you on the street, if you remember correctly.
subtitles.english: I accosted you on the street, if you remember correctly.

subtitles.original: Oh? Oh, that's what you're up to.
subtitles.english: Oh? Oh, that's what you're up to.

subtitles.english: Oh? What?

subtitles.original: おやおや？ Hey, wait, why did you do that? Ina would do such a thing! Why did you do that? That's wild.
subtitles.english: Oh my? Hey, wait, why did you do that? Ina would do such a thing! Why did you do that? That's wild.

subtitles.original: Don't worry about it. Hehe. Okay.
subtitles.english: Don't worry about it. Hehe. Okay.

subtitles.original: You know my... Ninomae... Inaness? Sorry.
subtitles.english: You know my... Ninomae... Inaness? Sorry.

subtitles.original: What did you do? You don't want to share? Nothing, I did nothing illegal.
subtitles.english: What did you do? You don't want to share? Nothing, I did nothing illegal.

subtitles.original: Don't tell me, keep your secrets.
subtitles.english: Don't tell me, keep your secrets.

subtitles.english: It's fine, I'm used to it for five years. Keep your secrets.

subtitles.original: Well, now that we know that everybody's here with their tickets and they're allowed to be here, we'll be singing a lot on this stage today in different combinations and different fun songs and so on.
